ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Ravi,

Aapke SaaS subscription 15 May 2026 ko renew hone wala hai. Agar aap continue karna chahte hain, koi action nahi lena. Agar cancel karna hai, renewal se pehle cancel kare.

Visit <URL> to manage your subscription.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best regards,
Customer Success Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
